case_title: RAQUEL MARGARITA BATEM VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATEM, RAQUEL MARGARITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATEM, RAQUEL MARGARITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT THE DOCTOR'S TREATMENT WAS NEGLIGENT OR CONSTITUTED MALPRACTICE AND DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE CLAIMS PRESENTATION REQUIREMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF RAQUEL MARGARITA BATEM IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY DANIEL NAVARRO COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BATEM, RAQUEL MARGARITA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 <WAIVER>) SERVED SEP-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
